title: Polar Bear Hotbar Selector
description: Changes the Hotbar Selector to a Polar Bear
body:
This pack changes the hotbar selector to look like a Polar Bear!

![Changes the Default Vanilla Hotbar Selector to a Polar Bear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54a8ca11ea97acc7bd3c5e6fb8ddafbbbf571033.webp)

This pack was originally created by Tgw Creeper. Since the [original version](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/polar-bear-hotbar-selector/) was designed for older versions of Minecraft, I have updated the files and folder structures to ensure it works perfectly with the latest releases.

All artistic credit goes to [Tgw Creeper](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/tgw_creeper/)!
